title: A Deep Conversation with David Silver (2019 ACM Prize) - YouTube
text:
Hello math fans. I'm back in Heidelberg
at the Laureate Forum and today I'm very
excited to be joined by David Silver who
is a computer scientist and the winner
or the awardee I should say of the 2019
ACM Prize in computing. And we're going
to start today by talking about
Scrabble.
Aren't we David?
>> [laughter]
>> Whatever you like. That sounds great.
Yeah.
>> So, Scrabble. The reason that I brought

introducing David on stage yesterday.
And I found this fantastic story

it was just you know, a thing which I

and then stopped enjoying I think when I
